name: Suspicious Linux Temporary PHP File Created in Container
description: Detects the creation of temporary PHP files within a containerized environment, which may indicate malicious activity, such as web shell deployment or unauthorized code execution. Temporary PHP files in containers are unusual and often linked to cyber threats, as attackers use them to gain persistent access or execute arbitrary commands.

rules.name: Suspicious Linux Temporary PHP File Created in Container

author: Vib Chhabra
